title: Improvisations: Light And Snow: 01
content:
The girl in the room beneath
    Before going to bed
    Strums on a mandolin
    The three simple tunes she knows.
    How inadequate they are to tell how her heart feels!
    When she has finished them several times
    She thrums the strings aimlessly with her finger-nails
    And smiles, and thinks happily of many things.
meaning: About: Conrad Potter Aiken (August 5, 1889 � August 17, 1973) was a Pulitzer Prize-winning American author, born in Savannah, Georgia, whose work includes poetry, short stories, novels, and an autobiography.
